title: March - Gamestorm - God Emperor
description:
God Emperor is a blood-stained fantasy Megagame of Power, Lies, and Regicide.

Ten thousand years ago, The God Emperor and his infinite army came down from Heaven. In a single night they took over the continent, slew the demon who ruled here, and built Mount Leviathan from its bones. He has ruled with an iron fist ever since: Perfect, infallible, and eternal. You know this because everyone says so, in public. There's nothing to contradict it. He burnt all the history books.

Now, though, you hear the same people also whisper blasphemy: The God Emperor grows weak. He is seen little, and makes few decrees. Soldiers desert his armies. The old religions, almost forgotten now, are re-sprouting like trees after a fire.

You are a member of a Noble House. As the God Emperor rots, you have grown strong. Soon, this land will be yours. You will command armies. Make laws. Plot treason.

You will become God.

NOTE: You must have a GameStorm badge to play this game. There is no additional cost beyond the GameStorm badge.

GameStorm 2026 Website

title: Deephaven
description:
Come to Deephaven! A narrative megagame about overly-ambitious dwarves building a new city fortress. Players will delve deep into the mountain to discover unique resources, forge legendary weapons, develop thriving trade and culture, and fight back against the many dangers they uncover!

All Dwarves are welcome at Deephaven! From the proud Mountain clans and industrious Hill clans, to the mysterious clans of the Deep. Yes, even Gully Dwarves are allowed! MINERS delve deep to find arcane metals! SHAPERS forge legendary weapons, armor, and new inventions. ARCHITECTS build awe-inspiring structures and massive fortifications. MERCHANTS handle foreign trade, FARMERS feed us, and BREWERS keep us, uh, well-hydrated! The CARTOGRAPHERS maintain the Grand Map and the INKBEARDS chronicle discoveries, announce oaths, grudges, and important events. The GUARDIANS keep the peace, and the LEGION leads us to war! Come to Deephaven! Build a new home for all Dwarves!

For Portland Megagames' run of this title, we will be in the beautiful Rae Loft building in NE Portland. The game runs from 10am-5pm and there will be a 45 minute lunch break. There are plenty of food places nearby but you are welcome to bring your own lunch. Email details will be sent out, including a casting questionnaire asking about your preferences for teams and roles, as well as a team and role briefings and rules closer to the game itself. We are excited to host this and hope you'll join us!

We will be teaching the game at the beginning of the day and you won't need to bring anything.

Costumes are encouraged but are by no means necessary.

There will be an after-game debrief/hangout at a local brewpub to chat about the game.

title: Crucible of Nations, Nov 15 2025 @ 10 AM
description:
Crucible of Nations is a fast-paced geopolitical megagame set in a fantasy world. Teams negotiate, bluff, threaten, betray, or cooperate as they guide their nations through great upheaval. Achieve your national objective with diplomacy, war, and espionage. Whether you're a seasoned megagamer or new to the genre, Crucible of Nations has something for everyone.

Civil war has shaken the Empire, creating a power vacuum unseen in centuries. Seven other nations grasp for power yet the imperial remnants refuse to bed. Will you lead your nation to glory, or witness its downfall?

For Portland Megagames' run of this title, we will be in the beautiful Rae Loft building in NE Portland. The game runs from 10am-5pm and there will be a 45 minute lunch break. There is plenty of food places nearby but you are welcome to bring your own lunch! Email details will be sent out, including a casting questionnaire asking about your preferences for teams and roles, as well as a team and role briefings and rules closer to the game itself. We are excited to host this and hope you'll join us!

We will be teaching the game at the beginning of the day and you won't need to bring anything.

Costumes are encouraged but are by no means necessary.

There will be an after-game debrief/hangout at Migration Brewing for those who are interested.

title: Den of Wolves: Infinite Domain, Oct 19 2025 @ 10 AM
description:
It is the 27th Century. After a catastrophic attack on humanity, one battleship and a few civilian vessels must fight to survive, govern themselves and maintain order as they flee from their pursuers. Den of Wolves: Infinite Domain is a game about difficult political, military and survival choices in a long-term crisis scenario. Players will take on the roles of starship captains, officers, and engineers, as well as politicians and military personnel. The game has a focus on managing resources, as well as various units and assets – however, talking and negotiating with other players will be crucial in order to achieve success.

Infinite Domain is an expanded version of the classic Den of Wolves. Includes additional ships and roles, a new faction, as well as some streamlined rules and a graphical overhaul. Previous experience with Den of Wolves is not required to play.

Please note that while most of PDXMG's games are in NE PDX, this one is at Vault 31 Bar & Game Cafe in Vancouver, WA.

Vault 31 is hosting both the game and the afterparty debrief, immediately following the game. Food and drink will be available for purchase from Vault 31 throughout the course of the day, as well as during the debrief.

title: The Generalissimo is Dead! - July 27, 2025 @ 10 AM
description:
The Generalissimo is Dead is a Megagame set in the chaos that follows the death of a strong, autocratic leader without any clear plan for succession.

The game is set in the late 1980s, early 1990s.

The modern era is firmly underway, the internet is here to stay and there has only been one superpower for quite some time.

Yugenya has gone from being a forgotten backwater to the frontline of an economic cold war between China and the West due to the discovery of large rare earth metal mines. In the latter years of the Generalissimo's life, he used the wealth from these mines to expand the revolutionary guard, build a navy and establish an air force.

Critics would also say he channelled much of the wealth into paranoia-fuelled schemes against imagined foes. Regardless, Yugenya has never been so important.

The loss of the guiding hand at this time is a crisis for all Party Members!

title: It Came From...The Skies! - April 12, 2025 @ 10 AM
description:
It all begins on an ordinary day when mysterious alien spacecraft suddenly fill the skies, casting eerie shadows over the nations of Earth. As chaos erupts and panic spreads among the global population, you and your fellow leaders must navigate a treacherous path to secure the survival of humanity. The fate of the world rests on your shoulders, and the decisions you make will shape the future of Earth.

In this near-future geopolitical game take on the role of a nation's leadership to respond to and address these odd events while maintaining your national goals.

This game has 4 person teams with an extraterrestrial 6 player team, and is an equal mix of role playing and mechanical.

title: Gods of the Ancient World - Jan 11, 2025 @ 10 AM
description:
Whether you're leading troops across the Mediterranean, building a thriving empire, or shaping the destiny of mortals as a mighty god, Gods of the Ancient World offers an immersive experience like no other.

Set during the height of the Roman and Greek civilizations, Gods of the Ancient World offers layers of strategy, negotiation, and world-building. Some players will manage resources, build industry, and manufacture fleets to sell artisanal goods to distant lands. Others will move troops throughout the Mediterranean and conquer regions for the glory of their faction. Still others will take on the roles of political leaders, developing laws for the betterment of their people whilst vying for their own political standings.

Meanwhile, another group of players will assume the mantles of the ancient gods – Zeus, Poseidon, Hera, etc. – seeking the prayers of mortals to gain power to perform miracles and win influence over their rivals.

This game is perfect for players who enjoy complex strategy, role-playing, and the chance to immerse themselves in an ancient world where every decision has the potential to change history.

title: Courting Trouble
description:
Players are part of 5-7 person Courts, of the Crownwardens, Dragonkin, Fae, Werewolves, Infernals, or Vampires in this romantasy trope inspired megagame. Court and marry your Desire, cause trouble for your Rival, and explore the adventurous storylines of the 6 courts.

This game is inspired by young adult romantasy, Bridgerton, A Court of Thorns and Roses, and other silly romance adventures. Mechanically you will be given a role, both you and your faction will have an 'Honor Level' that can be impacted by your actions. There are adventure storylines to follow, Desires to pursue, and Rivals to deride. This has some mechanics, but is a very RP-heavy game. Costuming is encouraged.

This will be our first year at the Direbrook Dark Fantasy Convention, a Portland-local 18+ event. https://www.direbrook.com/

You must have a Direbrook badge to play this game. There is no additional cost beyond the Direbrook badge.
